case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. WHOLESALE JEWELERS DIRECT, L.L.C.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO APPEAR AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO BAO LAI TANG, PMK FO DEFENDANT WHOLESALE JEWELERS DIRECT, LLC ON MAY-23-2018 - CONTINUED TO JUN-12-2018 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. EXAMINEE BAO LAI TANG REQUIRES THE ASSISTANCE OF A MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER IN ORDER TO PROCEED WITH TODAY'S OEX. DEBORAH LEW, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PETITIONER CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. BAO LAI TANG, THE PMK FOR DEFENDANT WHOLESALE JEWELERS DIRECT, LLC, WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER. PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE OEX ON FILE. A MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO BAO LAI TANG TO ASSIST HER AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON JUNE 12TH. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLESALE JEWELERS DIRECT, L.L.C. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED (BAO LAI TANG AS PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLESALE JEWELERS DIRECT, L.L.C. OEX HEARING SET FOR MAR-20-2018 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514
PROOF OF SERVICE (FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION) (TRANSACTION ID # 61622142) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT WHOLESALE JEWELERS DIRECT, LLC ON MAR-20-2018 - CONTINUED TO APR-26-2018 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 AT THE REQUEST OF DEBRA D. LEW, ESQ., COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ON 3/15/18. PLAINTIFF TO SEND NOTICE. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION OF BAO LING TANG AS PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE FOR DEFENDANT WHOLESALE JEWELERS DIRECT, LLC ON APR-26-2018 - CONTINUED TO MAY-23-2018 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES ON 4/26/18. PROOF OF SERVICE OF OEX ON FILE. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. EXAMINEE BAO LING TANG WAIVES NOTICE OF THE NEXT HEARING DATE. DEBRA D. LEW, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. EXAMINEE BAO LING TANG WAS PRESENT, PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. ALSO PRESENT, SAU CHAN, SUPPORT PERSON FOR MS. TANG. A CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO EXAMINEE BAO LING TANG TO ASSIST HER AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON 5/23/18. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT ON JUN-12-2018 - CONTINUED TO JUN-19-2018 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. DEBRA LEW, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF/CREDITOR CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. EXAMINEE BAO LAI TANG, WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND EXAMINED. COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER AIDONG NI ASSISTED MS. TANG DURING THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. THE PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE ON JUNE 19TH. A MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER SHALL BE PROVIDED TO DEFENDANT BAO LAI TANG TO ASSIST HER AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 63362558)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO , A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHOLESALE JEWELERS DIRECT, L.L.C. $129,645.93 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $129,645.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER OF EXAMINATION JUN-19-2018 - DISCHARGED AS TO EXAMINEE BAO LAI TANG, PMK FOR DEFENDANT WHOLESALE JEWELERS DIRECT, LLC, AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE EXAMINATION. DEBRA LEW, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. EXAMINEE BAO LAI TANG, A/K/A DIANA TANG, WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND EXAMINED. COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN SPEAKING INTERPRETER AIDONG NI ASSISTED MS. TANG DURING THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. PRIOR TO COMMENCEMENT OF THE OEX, THE COURT GAVE SPECIFIC INSTRUCTIONS TO MS. TANG TO ANSWER THE QUESTIONS POSED BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND TO PRODUCE THE REQUESTED DOCUMENTS. THE COURT ADVISED MS. TANG THAT IF SHE REFUSED TO ANSWER PLAINTIFF'S QUESTIONS, A FURTHER HEARING SHALL BE SET WHEREIN CONTEMPT PROCEEDINGS COULD ENSUE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
